001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.toStringArray;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.PredicateUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
025import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
026
027import java.lang.reflect.*;
028import java.util.*;
029import java.util.function.*;
030
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
038
039/**
040 * Neutral, marshaller-agnostic map of string-to-object entries.
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * This class is the base for {@link JsonMap} and the per-marshaller {@code XMap} variants. It carries
044 * all marshaller-neutral functionality such as typed accessors, fluent setters, bean integration,
045 * and {@link PathTraversal}-based path navigation. The default {@link #toString()} comes from
046 * {@link LinkedHashMap}; subclasses should override it to produce the appropriate marshalled form.
047 *
048 * <p>
049 * Note that the use of this class is optional. The serializers will accept any objects that implement the
050 * {@link Map} interface. But this class provides useful additional functionality when working with
051 * data models constructed from Java Collections Framework objects.
052 *
053 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
054 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
055 * </ul>
056 */
057@SuppressWarnings({
058   "java:S2160" // equals() / hashCode() inherited from LinkedHashMap; map equality is element-based
059})
060public class MarshalledMap extends LinkedHashMap<String,Object> {
061
062   @SuppressWarnings({
063      "java:S2160" // equals() / hashCode() inherited from MarshalledMap; map equality is element-based
064   })
065   private static class UnmodifiableMarshalledMap extends MarshalledMap {
066      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
067
068      @SuppressWarnings({
069         "synthetic-access" // Access to outer class members is intentional
070      })
071      UnmodifiableMarshalledMap(MarshalledMap contents) {
072         if (nn(contents))
073            contents.forEach(super::put);
074      }
075
076      @Override
077      public void clear() {
078         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
079      }
080
081      @Override
082      public Object compute(String key, BiFunction<? super String, ? super Object, ?> remappingFunction) {
083         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
084      }
085
086      @Override
087      public Object computeIfAbsent(String key, Function<? super String, ?> mappingFunction) {
088         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
089      }
090
091      @Override
092      public Object computeIfPresent(String key, BiFunction<? super String, ? super Object, ?> remappingFunction) {
093         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
094      }
095
096      @Override
097      public Set<Map.Entry<String,Object>> entrySet() {
098         return Collections.unmodifiableSet(super.entrySet());
099      }
100
101      @Override
102      public boolean isUnmodifiable() { return true; }
103
104      @Override
105      public Set<String> keySet() {
106         return Collections.unmodifiableSet(super.keySet());
107      }
108
109      @Override
110      public Object merge(String key, Object value, BiFunction<? super Object, ? super Object, ?> remappingFunction) {
111         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
112      }
113
114      @Override
115      public Object put(String key, Object val) {
116         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
117      }
118
119      @Override
120      public void putAll(Map<? extends String, ?> m) {
121         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
122      }
123
124      @Override
125      public Object putIfAbsent(String key, Object value) {
126         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
127      }
128
129      @Override
130      public Object remove(Object key) {
131         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
132      }
133
134      @Override
135      public boolean remove(Object key, Object value) {
136         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
137      }
138
139      @Override
140      public Object replace(String key, Object value) {
141         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
142      }
143
144      @Override
145      public boolean replace(String key, Object oldValue, Object newValue) {
146         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
147      }
148
149      @Override
150      public void replaceAll(BiFunction<? super String, ? super Object, ?> function) {
151         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
152      }
153
154      @Override
155      public Collection<Object> values() {
156         return Collections.unmodifiableCollection(super.values());
157      }
158   }
159
160   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
161   private static final Type[] EMPTY_TYPE_ARRAY = {};
162
163   /**
164    * An empty read-only MarshalledMap.
165    *
166    * @serial exclude
167    */
168   @SuppressWarnings({
169      "java:S2386" // Public static final field accessed externally, cannot be protected
170   })
171   public static final MarshalledMap EMPTY_MAP = new MarshalledMap() {
172
173      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
174
175      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
176      public Set<Map.Entry<String,Object>> entrySet() {
177         return Collections.<String,Object>emptyMap().entrySet();
178      }
179
180      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
181      public Set<String> keySet() {
182         return Collections.<String,Object>emptyMap().keySet();
183      }
184
185      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
186      public Object put(String key, Object value) {
187         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
188      }
189
190      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
191      public Object remove(Object key) {
192         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
193      }
194
195      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
196      public Collection<Object> values() {
197         return mape().values();
198      }
199   };
200
201   /**
202    * Construct an empty map.
203    *
204    * @return An empty map.
205    */
206   public static MarshalledMap create() {
207      return new MarshalledMap();
208   }
209
210   /**
211    * Construct an empty filtered map.
212    *
213    * @return An empty map.
214    */
215   public static MarshalledMap filteredMap() {
216      return create().filtered();
217   }
218
219   /**
220    * Construct a filtered map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
221    *
222    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
223    * @return A new map, never <jk>null</jk>.
224    */
225   public static MarshalledMap filteredMap(Object...keyValuePairs) {
226      return new MarshalledMap(keyValuePairs).filtered();
227   }
228
229   /**
230    * Construct a map initialized with the specified map.
231    *
232    * @param values
233    *    The map to copy.
234    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
235    *    <br>Keys will be converted to strings using {@link Object#toString()}.
236    * @return A new map or <jk>null</jk> if the map was <jk>null</jk>.
237    */
238   public static MarshalledMap of(Map<?,?> values) {
239      return values == null ? null : new MarshalledMap(values);
240   }
241
242   /**
243    * Construct a map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
244    *
245    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
246    * @return A new map, never <jk>null</jk>.
247    */
248   public static MarshalledMap of(Object...keyValuePairs) {
249      return new MarshalledMap(keyValuePairs);
250   }
251
252   /**
253    * Construct a map initialized by parsing the specified string with the specified parser.
254    *
255    * @param in The input being parsed.
256    * @param p
257    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
258    *    <br>Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
259    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
260    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
261    */
262   public static MarshalledMap ofString(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
263      return in == null ? new MarshalledMap() : new MarshalledMap(in, p);
264   }
265
266   /**
267    * Construct a map initialized by parsing the specified reader with the specified parser.
268    *
269    * @param in The reader containing the input being parsed.
270    * @param p
271    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
272    *    <br>Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
273    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
274    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
275    */
276   public static MarshalledMap ofString(java.io.Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
277      return in == null ? new MarshalledMap() : new MarshalledMap(in, p);
278   }
279
280   /*
281    * If c1 is a child of c2 or the same as c2, returns c1.
282    * Otherwise, returns c2.
283    */
284   private static ClassMeta<?> getNarrowedClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> c1, ClassMeta<?> c2) {
285      if (c2 == null || c2.isAssignableFrom(c1.inner()))
286         return c1;
287      return c2;
288   }
289
290   private transient MarshallingSession session;
291   private transient Map<String,Object> inner;
292
293   private transient PathTraversal pathTraversal;
294
295   private transient Predicate<Object> valueFilter = x -> true;
296
297   /**
298    * Construct an empty map.
299    */
300   public MarshalledMap() {}
301
302   /**
303    * Construct an empty map with the specified bean context.
304    *
305    * @param session The bean session to use for creating beans.
306    */
307   public MarshalledMap(MarshallingSession session) {
308      this.session = session;
309   }
310
311   /**
312    * Construct a map initialized by parsing the specified string with the specified parser.
313    *
314    * @param in
315    *    The input being parsed.
316    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
317    * @param p
318    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
319    *    <br>Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
320    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
321    */
322   public MarshalledMap(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
323      this(assertArgNotNull("p", p).getMarshallingContext().getSession());
324      if (ne(in))
325         p.parseIntoMap(in, this, bs().string(), bs().object());
326   }
327
328   /**
329    * Construct a map initialized with the specified map.
330    *
331    * @param in
332    *    The map to copy.
333    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
334    *    <br>Keys will be converted to strings using {@link Object#toString()}.
335    */
336   public MarshalledMap(Map<?,?> in) {
337      this();
338      if (nn(in))
339         in.forEach((k, v) -> put(k.toString(), v));
340   }
341
342   /**
343    * Construct a map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
344    *
345    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
346    */
347   public MarshalledMap(Object...keyValuePairs) {
348      assertArg(keyValuePairs.length % 2 == 0, "Odd number of parameters passed into MarshalledMap(Object...)");
349      for (var i = 0; i + 1 < keyValuePairs.length; i += 2)
350         put(s(keyValuePairs[i]), keyValuePairs[i + 1]);
351   }
352
353   /**
354    * Construct a map initialized by parsing the specified reader with the specified parser.
355    *
356    * @param in
357    *    The reader containing the input being parsed.
358    * @param p
359    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
360    *    <br>Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
361    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
362    */
363   public MarshalledMap(java.io.Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
364      this(assertArgNotNull("p", p).getMarshallingContext().getSession());
365      p.parseIntoMap(in, this, bs().string(), bs().object());
366   }
367
368   /**
369    * Appends all the entries in the specified map to this map.
370    *
371    * @param values The map to copy.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
372    * @return This object.
373    */
374   public MarshalledMap append(Map<String,Object> values) {
375      if (nn(values))
376         super.putAll(values);
377      return this;
378   }
379
380   /**
381    * Adds an entry to this map.
382    *
383    * @param key The key.
384    * @param value The value.
385    * @return This object.
386    */
387   public MarshalledMap append(String key, Object value) {
388      put(key, value);
389      return this;
390   }
391
392   /**
393    * Adds the first value that matches the specified predicate.
394    *
395    * @param <T> The value types.
396    * @param test The predicate to match against.
397    * @param key The key.
398    * @param values The values to test.
399    * @return This object.
400    */
401   @SuppressWarnings({
402      "unchecked", // Generic varargs is safe here: values are only iterated, not stored into a typed array.
403      "varargs"
404   })
405   public <T> MarshalledMap appendFirst(Predicate<T> test, String key, T...values) {
406      for (var v : values)
407         if (test(test, v))
408            return append(key, v);
409      return this;
410   }
411
412   /**
413    * Add if flag is <jk>true</jk>.
414    *
415    * @param flag The flag to check.
416    * @param key The key.
417    * @param value The value.
418    * @return This object.
419    */
420   public MarshalledMap appendIf(boolean flag, String key, Object value) {
421      if (flag)
422         append(key, value);
423      return this;
424   }
425
426   /**
427    * Add if predicate matches value.
428    *
429    * @param <T> The value type.
430    * @param test The predicate to match against.
431    * @param key The key.
432    * @param value The value.
433    * @return This object.
434    */
435   public <T> MarshalledMap appendIf(Predicate<T> test, String key, T value) {
436      return appendIf(test(test, value), key, value);
437   }
438
439   /**
440    * Adds a value in this map if the entry does not exist or the current value is <jk>null</jk>.
441    *
442    * @param key The map key.
443    * @param value The value to set if the current value does not exist or is <jk>null</jk>.
444    * @return This object.
445    */
446   public MarshalledMap appendIfAbsent(String key, Object value) {
447      return appendIfAbsentIf(x -> true, key, value);
448   }
449
450   /**
451    * Adds a value in this map if the entry does not exist or the current value is <jk>null</jk> and the value matches the specified predicate.
452    *
453    * @param <T> The value type.
454    * @param predicate The predicate to test the value with.
455    * @param key The map key.
456    * @param value The value to set if the current value does not exist or is <jk>null</jk>.
457    * @return This object.
458    */
459   public <T> MarshalledMap appendIfAbsentIf(Predicate<T> predicate, String key, T value) {
460      Object o = get(key);
461      if (o == null && predicate.test(value))
462         put(key, value);
463      return this;
464   }
465
466   /**
467    * Returns the node addressed by the specified <a class="doclink" href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901">RFC 6901</a>
468    * JSON Pointer relative to this map.
469    *
470    * <p>
471    * Convenience for <c>MarshalledNode.<jsm>of</jsm>(<jk>this</jk>).at(<jv>pointer</jv>)</c>. A read-miss returns
472    * <jk>null</jk>; an addressed JSON <jk>null</jk> value returns a null node.
473    *
474    * <p>
475    * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This method is part of the next-generation typed tree model layered over the
476    * {@code Marshalled*} collections and may change incompatibly in a future release.
477    *
478    * @param pointer The RFC 6901 JSON Pointer.
479    * @return A node wrapping the addressed value, or <jk>null</jk> if the addressed value is absent.
480    */
481   public MarshalledNode at(String pointer) {
482      return MarshalledNode.of(this).at(pointer);
483   }
484
485   /**
486    * Serializes this map to a string using the specified serializer.
487    *
488    * @param serializer The serializer to use to convert this object to a string.
489    * @return This object serialized as a string.
490    */
491   public String toString(WriterSerializer serializer) {
492      return serializer.toString(this);
493   }
494
495   /**
496    * Converts this map into an object of the specified type.
497    *
498    * <p>
499    * If this map contains a <js>"_type"</js> entry, it must be the same as or a subclass of the <c>type</c>.
500    *
501    * @param <T> The class type to convert this map object to.
502    * @param type The class type to convert this map object to.
503    * @return The new object.
504    * @throws ClassCastException
505    *    If the <js>"_type"</js> entry is present and not assignable from <c>type</c>
506    */
507   @SuppressWarnings({
508      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
509   })
510   public <T> T cast(Class<T> type) {
511      MarshallingSession bs = bs();
512      ClassMeta<?> c2 = bs.getClassMeta(type);
513      String typePropertyName = bs.getBeanTypePropertyName(c2);
514      ClassMeta<?> c1 = bs.getBeanRegistry().getClassMeta((String)get(typePropertyName));
515      ClassMeta<?> c = c1 == null ? c2 : narrowClassMeta(c1, c2);
516      if (c.isObject())
517         return (T)this;
518      return (T)cast2(c);
519   }
520
521   /**
522    * Same as {@link #cast(Class)}, except allows you to specify a {@link ClassMeta} parameter.
523    *
524    * @param <T> The class type to convert this map object to.
525    * @param cm The class type to convert this map object to.
526    * @return The new object.
527    * @throws ClassCastException
528    *    If the <js>"_type"</js> entry is present and not assignable from <c>type</c>
529    */
530   @SuppressWarnings({
531      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for ClassMeta<T>
532   })
533   public <T> T cast(ClassMeta<T> cm) {
534      MarshallingSession bs = bs();
535      var c1 = bs.getBeanRegistry().getClassMeta((String)get(bs.getBeanTypePropertyName(cm)));
536      var c = narrowClassMeta(c1, cm);
537      return (T)cast2(c);
538   }
539
540   @Override /* Overridden from Map */
541   public boolean containsKey(Object key) {
542      if (super.containsKey(key))
543         return true;
544      if (nn(inner))
545         return inner.containsKey(key);
546      return false;
547   }
548
549   /**
550    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the map contains the specified entry and the value is not null nor an empty string.
551    *
552    * <p>
553    * Always returns <jk>false</jk> if the value is not a {@link CharSequence}.
554    *
555    * @param key The key.
556    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the map contains the specified entry and the value is not null nor an empty string.
557    */
558   public boolean containsKeyNotEmpty(String key) {
559      Object val = get(key);
560      if (val == null)
561         return false;
562      if (val instanceof CharSequence val2)
563         return isNotBlank(val2);
564      return false;
565   }
566
567   /**
568    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this map contains the specified key, ignoring the inner map if it exists.
569    *
570    * @param key The key to look up.
571    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this map contains the specified key.
572    */
573   public boolean containsOuterKey(Object key) {
574      return super.containsKey(key);
575   }
576
577   /**
578    * Similar to {@link #remove(Object) remove(Object)}, but the key is a slash-delimited path used to traverse entries
579    * in this POJO.
580    *
581    * <p>
582    * This method uses the {@link PathTraversal} class to perform the lookup, so the map can contain any of the various
583    * class types that the {@link PathTraversal} class supports (e.g. beans, collections, arrays).
584    *
585    * @param path The path to the entry.
586    * @return The previous value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
587    */
588   public Object deleteAt(String path) {
589      return getPathTraversal().delete(path);
590   }
591
592   @Override /* Overridden from Map */
593   public Set<Map.Entry<String,Object>> entrySet() {
594      if (inner == null)
595         return super.entrySet();
596
597      final Set<String> keySet = keySet();
598      final Iterator<String> keys = keySet.iterator();
599
600      return new AbstractSet<>() {
601
602         @Override /* Overridden from Iterable */
603         public Iterator<Map.Entry<String,Object>> iterator() {
604
605            return new Iterator<>() {
606
607               @Override /* Overridden from Iterator */
608               public boolean hasNext() {
609                  return keys.hasNext();
610               }
611
612               @Override /* Overridden from Iterator */
613               public Map.Entry<String,Object> next() {
614                  return new Map.Entry<>() {
615                     String key = keys.next();
616
617                     @Override /* Overridden from Map.Entry */
618                     public String getKey() { return key; }
619
620                     @Override /* Overridden from Map.Entry */
621                     public Object getValue() { return get(key); }
622
623                     @Override /* Overridden from Map.Entry */
624                     public Object setValue(Object object) {
625                        return put(key, object);
626                     }
627                  };
628               }
629
630               @Override /* Overridden from Iterator */
631               public void remove() {
632                  throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
633               }
634            };
635         }
636
637         @Override /* Overridden from Set */
638         public int size() {
639            return keySet.size();
640         }
641      };
642   }
643
644   /**
645    * Returns a copy of this map without the specified keys.
646    *
647    * @param keys The keys of the entries not to copy.
648    * @return A new map without the keys and values from this map.
649    */
650   public MarshalledMap exclude(String...keys) {
651      var m2 = new MarshalledMap();
652      this.forEach((k, v) -> {
653         var exclude = false;
654         for (var kk : keys)
655            if (kk.equals(k))
656               exclude = true;
657         if (! exclude)
658            m2.put(k, v);
659      });
660      return m2;
661   }
662
663   /**
664    * Enables filtering based on default values.
665    *
666    * <p>
667    * Any of the following types will be ignored when set as values in this map:
668    * <ul>
669    *    <li><jk>null</jk>
670    *    <li><jk>false</jk>
671    *    <li><c>-1</c> (any Number type)
672    *    <li>Empty arrays/collections/maps.
673    * </ul>
674    * @return This object.
675    */
676   public MarshalledMap filtered() {
677      // @formatter:off
678      return filtered(x -> ! (
679         x == null
680         || (x instanceof Boolean x2 && x2.equals(false))
681         || (x instanceof Number x3 && x3.intValue() == -1)
682      || (isArray(x) && Array.getLength(x) == 0)
683      || (x instanceof Map<?,?> x2 && x2.isEmpty())
684      || (x instanceof Collection<?> x3 && x3.isEmpty())
685      ));
686      // @formatter:on
687   }
688
689   /**
690    * Enables filtering based on a predicate test.
691    *
692    * <p>
693    * If the predicate evaluates to <jk>false</jk> on values added to this map, the entry will be skipped.
694    *
695    * @param value The value tester predicate.
696    * @return This object.
697    */
698   public MarshalledMap filtered(Predicate<Object> value) {
699      valueFilter = value;
700      return this;
701   }
702
703   /**
704    * Returns the value for the first key in the list that has an entry in this map.
705    *
706    * <p>
707    * Casts or converts the value to the specified class type.
708    *
709    * <p>
710    * See {@link MarshallingSession#convertToType(Object, ClassMeta)} for the list of valid data conversions.
711    *
712    * @param type The class type to convert the value to.
713    * @param <T> The class type to convert the value to.
714    * @param keys The keys to look up in order.
715    * @return The value of the first entry whose key exists, or <jk>null</jk> if none of the keys exist in this map.
716    */
717   public <T> T find(Class<T> type, String...keys) {
718      for (var key : keys)
719         if (containsKey(key))
720            return get(key, type);
721      return null;
722   }
723
724   /**
725    * Returns the value for the first key in the list that has an entry in this map.
726    *
727    * @param keys The keys to look up in order.
728    * @return The value of the first entry whose key exists, or <jk>null</jk> if none of the keys exist in this map.
729    */
730   public Object find(String...keys) {
731      for (var key : keys)
732         if (containsKey(key))
733            return get(key);
734      return null;
735   }
736
737   /**
738    * Returns the first entry that exists converted to a {@link Boolean}.
739    *
740    * @param keys The list of keys to look for.
741    * @return
742    *    The converted value of the first key in the list that has an entry in this map, or <jk>null</jk> if the map
743    *    contains no mapping for any of the keys.
744    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
745    */
746   public Boolean findBoolean(String...keys) {
747      return find(Boolean.class, keys);
748   }
749
750   /**
751    * Returns the first entry that exists converted to an {@link Integer}.
752    *
753    * @param keys The list of keys to look for.
754    * @return
755    *    The converted value of the first key in the list that has an entry in this map, or <jk>null</jk> if the map
756    *    contains no mapping for any of the keys.
757    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
758    */
759   public Integer findInt(String...keys) {
760      return find(Integer.class, keys);
761   }
762
763   /**
764    * Searches for the specified key in this map ignoring case.
765    *
766    * @param key
767    *    The key to search for.
768    *    For performance reasons, it's preferable that the key be all lowercase.
769    * @return The key, or <jk>null</jk> if map does not contain this key.
770    */
771   public String findKeyIgnoreCase(String key) {
772      for (var k : keySet())
773         if (eqic(key, k))
774            return k;
775      return null;
776   }
777
778   /**
779    * Returns the first entry that exists converted to a {@link MarshalledList}.
780    *
781    * @param keys The list of keys to look for.
782    * @return
783    *    The converted value of the first key in the list that has an entry in this map, or <jk>null</jk> if the map
784    *    contains no mapping for any of the keys.
785    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
786    */
787   public MarshalledList findList(String...keys) {
788      return find(MarshalledList.class, keys);
789   }
790
791   /**
792    * Returns the first entry that exists converted to a {@link Long}.
793    *
794    * @param keys The list of keys to look for.
795    * @return
796    *    The converted value of the first key in the list that has an entry in this map, or <jk>null</jk> if the map
797    *    contains no mapping for any of the keys.
798    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
799    */
800   public Long findLong(String...keys) {
801      return find(Long.class, keys);
802   }
803
804   /**
805    * Returns the first entry that exists converted to a {@link MarshalledMap}.
806    *
807    * @param keys The list of keys to look for.
808    * @return
809    *    The converted value of the first key in the list that has an entry in this map, or <jk>null</jk> if the map
810    *    contains no mapping for any of the keys.
811    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
812    */
813   public MarshalledMap findMap(String...keys) {
814      return find(MarshalledMap.class, keys);
815   }
816
817   /**
818    * Returns the first entry that exists converted to a {@link String}.
819    *
820    * @param keys The list of keys to look for.
821    * @return
822    *    The converted value of the first key in the list that has an entry in this map, or <jk>null</jk> if the map
823    *    contains no mapping for any of the keys.
824    */
825   public String findString(String...keys) {
826      return find(String.class, keys);
827   }
828
829   @Override /* Overridden from Map */
830   public Object get(Object key) {
831      Object o = super.get(key);
832      if (o == null && nn(inner))
833         o = inner.get(key);
834      return o;
835   }
836
837   /**
838    * Same as {@link Map#get(Object) get()}, but casts or converts the value to the specified class type.
839    *
840    * <p>
841    * See {@link MarshallingSession#convertToType(Object, ClassMeta)} for the list of valid data conversions.
842    *
843    * @param key The key.
844    * @param <T> The class type returned.
845    * @param type The class type returned.
846    * @return The value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
847    */
848   public <T> T get(String key, Class<T> type) {
849      return getWithDefault(key, (T)null, type);
850   }
851
852   /**
853    * Same as {@link #get(String,Class)}, but allows for complex data types consisting of collections or maps.
854    *
855    * <p>
856    * The type can be a simple type (e.g. beans, strings, numbers) or parameterized type (collections/maps).
857    *
858    * <p>
859    * See {@link MarshallingSession#convertToType(Object, ClassMeta)} for the list of valid data conversions.
860    *
861    * @param key The key.
862    * @param <T> The class type returned.
863    * @param type The class type returned.
864    * @param args The class type parameters.
865    * @return The value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
866    */
867   public <T> T get(String key, Type type, Type...args) {
868      return getWithDefault(key, null, type, args);
869   }
870
871   /**
872    * Same as {@link #get(String,Class) get(String,Class)}, but the key is a slash-delimited path used to traverse
873    * entries in this POJO.
874    *
875    * @param path The path to the entry.
876    * @param type The class type.
877    *
878    * @param <T> The class type.
879    * @return The value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
880    */
881   public <T> T getAt(String path, Class<T> type) {
882      return getPathTraversal().get(path, type);
883   }
884
885   /**
886    * Same as {@link #getAt(String,Class)}, but allows for conversion to complex maps and collections.
887    *
888    * @param path The path to the entry.
889    * @param type The class type.
890    * @param args The class parameter types.
891    *
892    * @param <T> The class type.
893    * @return The value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
894    */
895   public <T> T getAt(String path, Type type, Type...args) {
896      return getPathTraversal().get(path, type, args);
897   }
898
899   /**
900    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link Boolean}.
901    *
902    * @param key The key.
903    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
904    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
905    */
906   public Boolean getBoolean(String key) {
907      return get(key, Boolean.class);
908   }
909
910   /**
911    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link Boolean}.
912    *
913    * @param key The key.
914    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
915    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
916    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
917    */
918   public Boolean getBoolean(String key, Boolean defVal) {
919      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, Boolean.class);
920   }
921
922   /**
923    * Returns the class type of the object at the specified index.
924    *
925    * @param key The key into this map.
926    * @return
927    *    The data type of the object at the specified key, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is null or does not exist.
928    */
929   @SuppressWarnings({
930      "java:S1452"  // Wildcard required - ClassMeta<?> for value type metadata
931   })
932   public ClassMeta<?> getClassMeta(String key) {
933      return bs().getClassMetaForObject(get(key));
934   }
935
936   /**
937    * Returns the first key in the map.
938    *
939    * @return The first key in the map, or <jk>null</jk> if the map is empty.
940    */
941   public String getFirstKey() { return first(keySet()).orElse(null); }
942
943   /**
944    * Returns the specified entry value converted to an {@link Integer}.
945    *
946    * @param key The key.
947    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
948    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
949    */
950   public Integer getInt(String key) {
951      return get(key, Integer.class);
952   }
953
954   /**
955    * Returns the specified entry value converted to an {@link Integer}.
956    *
957    * @param key The key.
958    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
959    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
960    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
961    */
962   public Integer getInt(String key, Integer defVal) {
963      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, Integer.class);
964   }
965
966   /**
967    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link MarshalledList}.
968    *
969    * @param key The key.
970    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
971    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
972    */
973   public MarshalledList getList(String key) {
974      return get(key, MarshalledList.class);
975   }
976
977   /**
978    * Same as {@link #getList(String)} but creates a new empty {@link MarshalledList} if it doesn't already exist.
979    *
980    * @param key The key.
981    * @param createIfNotExists If mapping doesn't already exist, create one with an empty {@link MarshalledList}.
982    * @return The converted value, or an empty value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
983    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
984    */
985   public MarshalledList getList(String key, boolean createIfNotExists) {
986      var m = getWithDefault(key, null, MarshalledList.class);
987      if (m == null && createIfNotExists) {
988         m = new MarshalledList();
989         put(key, m);
990      }
991      return m;
992   }
993
994   /**
995    * Same as {@link #getList(String, MarshalledList)} except converts the elements to the specified types.
996    *
997    * @param <E> The element type.
998    * @param key The key.
999    * @param elementType The element type class.
1000    * @param def The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1001    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1002    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1003    */
1004   public <E> List<E> getList(String key, Class<E> elementType, List<E> def) {
1005      Object o = get(key);
1006      if (o == null)
1007         return def;
1008      return bs().convertToType(o, List.class, elementType);
1009   }
1010
1011   /**
1012    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link MarshalledList}.
1013    *
1014    * @param key The key.
1015    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1016    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1017    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1018    */
1019   public MarshalledList getList(String key, MarshalledList defVal) {
1020      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, MarshalledList.class);
1021   }
1022
1023   /**
1024    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link Long}.
1025    *
1026    * @param key The key.
1027    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1028    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1029    */
1030   public Long getLong(String key) {
1031      return get(key, Long.class);
1032   }
1033
1034   /**
1035    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link Long}.
1036    *
1037    * @param key The key.
1038    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1039    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1040    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1041    */
1042   public Long getLong(String key, Long defVal) {
1043      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, Long.class);
1044   }
1045
1046   /**
1047    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link Map}.
1048    *
1049    * @param key The key.
1050    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1051    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1052    */
1053   public MarshalledMap getMap(String key) {
1054      return get(key, MarshalledMap.class);
1055   }
1056
1057   /**
1058    * Same as {@link #getMap(String)} but creates a new empty {@link MarshalledMap} if it doesn't already exist.
1059    *
1060    * @param key The key.
1061    * @param createIfNotExists If mapping doesn't already exist, create one with an empty {@link MarshalledMap}.
1062    * @return The converted value, or an empty value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1063    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1064    */
1065   public MarshalledMap getMap(String key, boolean createIfNotExists) {
1066      var m = getWithDefault(key, null, MarshalledMap.class);
1067      if (m == null && createIfNotExists) {
1068         m = new MarshalledMap();
1069         put(key, m);
1070      }
1071      return m;
1072   }
1073
1074   /**
1075    * Same as {@link #getMap(String, MarshalledMap)} except converts the keys and values to the specified types.
1076    *
1077    * @param <K> The key type.
1078    * @param <V> The value type.
1079    * @param key The key.
1080    * @param keyType The key type class.
1081    * @param valType The value type class.
1082    * @param def The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1083    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1084    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1085    */
1086   public <K,V> Map<K,V> getMap(String key, Class<K> keyType, Class<V> valType, Map<K,V> def) {
1087      Object o = get(key);
1088      if (o == null)
1089         return def;
1090      return bs().convertToType(o, Map.class, keyType, valType);
1091   }
1092
1093   /**
1094    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link MarshalledMap}.
1095    *
1096    * @param key The key.
1097    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1098    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1099    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1100    */
1101   public MarshalledMap getMap(String key, MarshalledMap defVal) {
1102      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, MarshalledMap.class);
1103   }
1104
1105   /**
1106    * Returns the {@link MarshallingSession} currently associated with this map.
1107    *
1108    * @return The {@link MarshallingSession} currently associated with this map.
1109    */
1110   public MarshallingSession getMarshallingSession() { return session; }
1111
1112   /**
1113    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link String}.
1114    *
1115    * @param key The key.
1116    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1117    */
1118   public String getString(String key) {
1119      return get(key, String.class);
1120   }
1121
1122   /**
1123    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link String}.
1124    *
1125    * @param key The key.
1126    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1127    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1128    */
1129   public String getString(String key, String defVal) {
1130      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, String.class);
1131   }
1132
1133   /**
1134    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link String}[] array.
1135    *
1136    * @param key The key.
1137    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1138    */
1139   public String[] getStringArray(String key) {
1140      return getStringArray(key, null);
1141   }
1142
1143   /**
1144    * Same as {@link #getStringArray(String)} but returns a default value if the value cannot be found.
1145    *
1146    * @param key The map key.
1147    * @param def The default value if value is not found.
1148    * @return The value converted to a string array.
1149    */
1150   public String[] getStringArray(String key, String[] def) {
1151      Object s = get(key, Object.class);
1152      if (s == null)
1153         return def;
1154      String[] r = null;
1155      if (s instanceof Collection<?> s2)
1156         r = toStringArray(s2);
1157      else if (s instanceof String[] s2)
1158         r = s2;
1159      else if (s instanceof Object[] s3)
1160         r = toStringArray(l(s3));
1161      else
1162         r = StringUtils.splita(s(s));
1163      return (r == null || r.length == 0) ? def : r;
1164   }
1165
1166   /**
1167    * Same as {@link Map#get(Object) get()}, but converts the raw value to the specified class type using the specified
1168    * POJO swap.
1169    *
1170    * @param key The key.
1171    * @param objectSwap The swap class used to convert the raw type to a transformed type.
1172    * @param <T> The transformed class type.
1173    * @return The value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
1174    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
1175    */
1176   @SuppressWarnings({
1177      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling for generic type handling
1178      "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in ObjectSwap operations
1179   })
1180   public <T> T getSwapped(String key, ObjectSwap<T,?> objectSwap) throws ParseException {
1181      try {
1182         Object o = super.get(key);
1183         if (o == null)
1184            return null;
1185         ObjectSwap swap = objectSwap;
1186         return (T)swap.unswap(bs(), o, null);
1187      } catch (ParseException e) {
1188         throw e;
1189      } catch (Exception e) {
1190         throw new ParseException(e);
1191      }
1192   }
1193
1194   /**
1195    * Same as {@link Map#get(Object) get()}, but returns the default value if the key could not be found.
1196    *
1197    * @param key The key.
1198    * @param def The default value if the entry doesn't exist.
1199    * @return The value, or the default value if the entry doesn't exist.
1200    */
1201   public Object getWithDefault(String key, Object def) {
1202      Object o = get(key);
1203      return (o == null ? def : o);
1204   }
1205
1206   /**
1207    * Same as {@link #get(String,Class)} but returns a default value if the value does not exist.
1208    *
1209    * @param key The key.
1210    * @param def The default value.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1211    * @param <T> The class type returned.
1212    * @param type The class type returned.
1213    * @return The value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
1214    */
1215   public <T> T getWithDefault(String key, T def, Class<T> type) {
1216      return getWithDefault(key, def, type, EMPTY_TYPE_ARRAY);
1217   }
1218
1219   /**
1220    * Same as {@link #get(String,Type,Type...)} but returns a default value if the value does not exist.
1221    *
1222    * @param key The key.
1223    * @param def The default value.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1224    * @param <T> The class type returned.
1225    * @param type The class type returned.
1226    * @param args The class type parameters.
1227    * @return The value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
1228    */
1229   public <T> T getWithDefault(String key, T def, Type type, Type...args) {
1230      Object o = get(key);
1231      if (o == null)
1232         return def;
1233      T t = bs().convertToType(o, type, args);
1234      return t == null ? def : t;
1235   }
1236
1237   /**
1238    * Returns a copy of this map with only the specified keys.
1239    *
1240    * @param keys The keys of the entries to copy.
1241    * @return A new map with just the keys and values from this map.
1242    */
1243   public MarshalledMap include(String...keys) {
1244      var m2 = new MarshalledMap();
1245      this.forEach((k, v) -> {
1246         for (var kk : keys)
1247            if (kk.equals(k))
1248               m2.put(kk, v);
1249      });
1250      return m2;
1251   }
1252
1253   /**
1254    * Set an inner map in this map to allow for chained get calls.
1255    *
1256    * <p>
1257    * If {@link #get(Object)} returns <jk>null</jk>, then {@link #get(Object)} will be called on the inner map.
1258    *
1259    * @param inner
1260    *    The inner map.
1261    *    Can be <jk>null</jk> to remove the inner map from an existing map.
1262    * @return This object.
1263    */
1264   public MarshalledMap inner(Map<String,Object> inner) {
1265      this.inner = inner;
1266      return this;
1267   }
1268
1269   /**
1270    * Shortcut for <code>getWithDefault(key, defVal, Boolean.<jk>class</jk>)</code>.
1271    *
1272    * @param key The key.
1273    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1274    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1275    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1276    */
1277   public boolean is(String key, boolean defVal) {
1278      Boolean result = getWithDefault(key, defVal, Boolean.class);
1279      return result != null ? result : defVal;
1280   }
1281
1282   /**
1283    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this map is unmodifiable.
1284    *
1285    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this map is unmodifiable.
1286    */
1287   public boolean isUnmodifiable() { return false; }
1288
1289   /**
1290    * The opposite of {@link #removeAll(String...)}.
1291    *
1292    * <p>
1293    * Discards all keys from this map that aren't in the specified list.
1294    *
1295    * @param keys The keys to keep.
1296    * @return This map.
1297    */
1298   public MarshalledMap keepAll(String...keys) {
1299      for (var i = keySet().iterator(); i.hasNext();) {
1300         var remove = true;
1301         var key = i.next();
1302         for (var k : keys) {
1303            if (k.equals(key)) {
1304               remove = false;
1305               break;
1306            }
1307         }
1308         if (remove)
1309            i.remove();
1310      }
1311      return this;
1312   }
1313
1314   @Override /* Overridden from Map */
1315   public Set<String> keySet() {
1316      if (inner == null)
1317         return super.keySet();
1318      Set<String> s = set();
1319      s.addAll(inner.keySet());
1320      s.addAll(super.keySet());
1321      return s;
1322   }
1323
1324   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
1325   public boolean equals(Object o) {
1326      return super.equals(o);
1327   }
1328
1329   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
1330   public int hashCode() {
1331      return super.hashCode();
1332   }
1333
1334   /**
1335    * Returns a modifiable copy of this map if it's unmodifiable.
1336    *
1337    * @return A modifiable copy of this map if it's unmodifiable, or this map if it is already modifiable.
1338    */
1339   public MarshalledMap modifiable() {
1340      if (isUnmodifiable())
1341         return new MarshalledMap(this);
1342      return this;
1343   }
1344
1345   /**
1346    * Similar to {@link #putAt(String,Object) putAt(String,Object)}, but used to append to collections and arrays.
1347    *
1348    * <p>
1349    * This method uses the {@link PathTraversal} class to perform the lookup, so the map can contain any of the various
1350    * class types that the {@link PathTraversal} class supports (e.g. beans, collections, arrays).
1351    *
1352    * @param path The path to the entry.
1353    * @param o The new value.
1354    * @return The previous value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
1355    */
1356   public Object postAt(String path, Object o) {
1357      return getPathTraversal().post(path, o);
1358   }
1359
1360   @Override
1361   public Object put(String key, Object value) {
1362      if (valueFilter.test(value))
1363         return super.put(key, value);
1364      return null;
1365   }
1366
1367   /**
1368    * Same as <c>put(String,Object)</c>, but the key is a slash-delimited path used to traverse entries in this
1369    * POJO.
1370    *
1371    * <p>
1372    * This method uses the {@link PathTraversal} class to perform the lookup, so the map can contain any of the various
1373    * class types that the {@link PathTraversal} class supports (e.g. beans, collections, arrays).
1374    *
1375    * @param path The path to the entry.
1376    * @param o The new value.
1377    * @return The previous value, or <jk>null</jk> if the entry doesn't exist.
1378    */
1379   public Object putAt(String path, Object o) {
1380      return getPathTraversal().put(path, o);
1381   }
1382
1383   /**
1384    * Convenience method for removing several keys at once.
1385    *
1386    * @param keys The list of keys to remove.
1387    */
1388   public void removeAll(Collection<String> keys) {
1389      keys.forEach(this::remove);
1390   }
1391
1392   /**
1393    * Convenience method for removing several keys at once.
1394    *
1395    * @param keys The list of keys to remove.
1396    */
1397   public void removeAll(String...keys) {
1398      for (var k : keys)
1399         remove(k);
1400   }
1401
1402   /**
1403    * Equivalent to calling <code>removeWithDefault(key,<jk>null</jk>,Boolean.<jk>class</jk>)</code>.
1404    *
1405    * @param key The key.
1406    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1407    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1408    */
1409   public Boolean removeBoolean(String key) {
1410      return removeBoolean(key, null);
1411   }
1412
1413   /**
1414    * Equivalent to calling <code>removeWithDefault(key,def,Boolean.<jk>class</jk>)</code>.
1415    *
1416    * @param key The key.
1417    * @param def The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1418    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1419    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1420    */
1421   public Boolean removeBoolean(String key, Boolean def) {
1422      return removeWithDefault(key, def, Boolean.class);
1423   }
1424
1425   /**
1426    * Equivalent to calling <code>removeWithDefault(key,<jk>null</jk>,Integer.<jk>class</jk>)</code>.
1427    *
1428    * @param key The key.
1429    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1430    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1431    */
1432   public Integer removeInt(String key) {
1433      return removeInt(key, null);
1434   }
1435
1436   /**
1437    * Equivalent to calling <code>removeWithDefault(key,def,Integer.<jk>class</jk>)</code>.
1438    *
1439    * @param key The key.
1440    * @param def The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1441    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1442    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1443    */
1444   public Integer removeInt(String key, Integer def) {
1445      return removeWithDefault(key, def, Integer.class);
1446   }
1447
1448   /**
1449    * Equivalent to calling <code>removeWithDefault(key,<jk>null</jk>,String.<jk>class</jk>)</code>.
1450    *
1451    * @param key The key.
1452    * @return The converted value, or <jk>null</jk> if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1453    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1454    */
1455   public String removeString(String key) {
1456      return removeString(key, null);
1457   }
1458
1459   /**
1460    * Equivalent to calling <code>removeWithDefault(key,def,String.<jk>class</jk>)</code>.
1461    *
1462    * @param key The key.
1463    * @param def The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1464    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1465    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1466    */
1467   public String removeString(String key, String def) {
1468      return removeWithDefault(key, def, String.class);
1469   }
1470
1471   /**
1472    * Equivalent to calling <c>get(class,key,def)</c> followed by <c>remove(key);</c>
1473    * @param key The key.
1474    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
1475    * @param type The class type.
1476    *
1477    * @param <T> The class type.
1478    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
1479    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
1480    */
1481   public <T> T removeWithDefault(String key, T defVal, Class<T> type) {
1482      T t = getWithDefault(key, defVal, type);
1483      remove(key);
1484      return t;
1485   }
1486
1487   /**
1488    * Override the default bean session used for converting POJOs.
1489    *
1490    * <p>
1491    * Default is {@link MarshallingContext#DEFAULT}, which is sufficient in most cases.
1492    *
1493    * <p>
1494    * Useful if you're serializing/parsing beans with transforms defined.
1495    *
1496    * @param session The new bean session.
1497    * @return This object.
1498    */
1499   public MarshalledMap session(MarshallingSession session) {
1500      this.session = session;
1501      return this;
1502   }
1503
1504   /**
1505    * Sets the {@link MarshallingSession} currently associated with this map.
1506    *
1507    * @param value The {@link MarshallingSession} currently associated with this map.
1508    * @return This object.
1509    */
1510   public MarshalledMap setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value) {
1511      session = value;
1512      return this;
1513   }
1514
1515   /**
1516    * Returns an unmodifiable copy of this map if it's modifiable.
1517    *
1518    * @return An unmodifiable copy of this map if it's modifiable, or this map if it is already unmodifiable.
1519    */
1520   public MarshalledMap unmodifiable() {
1521      if (this instanceof UnmodifiableMarshalledMap this2)
1522         return this2;
1523      return new UnmodifiableMarshalledMap(this);
1524   }
1525
1526   /**
1527    * Returns the {@link MarshallingSession} associated with this map (lazily defaults to {@link MarshallingContext#DEFAULT_SESSION}).
1528    *
1529    * @return The {@link MarshallingSession} for this map.
1530    */
1531   protected MarshallingSession bs() {
1532      if (session == null)
1533         session = MarshallingContext.DEFAULT_SESSION;
1534      return session;
1535   }
1536
1537   /**
1538    * Factory hook used by {@link #cast(Class)} / {@link #cast(ClassMeta)} when the target map type cannot be
1539    * instantiated directly (e.g. when the caller asks for the {@link Map} interface).
1540    *
1541    * <p>
1542    * Subclasses should override to return an instance of the matching {@code XMap} variant so that callers chaining
1543    * off of <c>cast(Map.<jk>class</jk>)</c> still see their flavored map type.
1544    *
1545    * @param bs The marshalling session to associate with the new map.
1546    * @return A new map instance.
1547    */
1548   protected MarshalledMap newMarshalledMap(MarshallingSession bs) {
1549      return new MarshalledMap(bs);
1550   }
1551
1552   /*
1553    * Converts this map to the specified class type.
1554    */
1555   @SuppressWarnings({
1556      "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in dynamic map operations
1557      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
1558      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
1559   })
1560   private <T> T cast2(ClassMeta<T> cm) {
1561
1562      MarshallingSession bs = bs();
1563      try {
1564         Object value = get("value");
1565
1566         if (cm.isMap()) {
1567            Map m2 = (cm.canCreateNewInstance() ? (Map)cm.newInstance() : newMarshalledMap(bs));
1568            ClassMeta<?> kType = cm.getKeyType();
1569            ClassMeta<?> vType = cm.getValueType();
1570            forEach((k, v) -> {
1571               if (! k.equals(bs.getBeanTypePropertyName(cm))) {
1572
1573                  // Attempt to recursively cast child maps.
1574                  if (v instanceof MarshalledMap v2)
1575                     v = v2.cast(vType);
1576
1577                  Object k2 = (kType.isString() ? k : bs.convertToType(k, kType));
1578                  v = (vType.isObject() ? v : bs.convertToType(v, vType));
1579
1580                  m2.put(k2, v);
1581               }
1582            });
1583            return (T)m2;
1584
1585         } else if (cm.isBean()) {
1586            BeanMap<? extends T> bm = bs.newBeanMap(cm.inner());
1587
1588            // Iterate through all the entries in the map and set the individual field values.
1589            forEach((k, v) -> {
1590            if (! k.equals(bs.getBeanTypePropertyName(cm))) {
1591
1592               // Attempt to recursively cast child maps.
1593               if (v instanceof MarshalledMap v2) {
1594                  var pm = bm.getProperty(k);
1595                  if (pm != null)
1596                     v = v2.cast((ClassMeta<?>) pm.getMeta().getBeanInfo());
1597               }
1598
1599               bm.put(k, v);
1600            }
1601            });
1602
1603            return bm.getBean();
1604
1605         } else if (cm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
1606            var items = (List)get("items");
1607            return bs.convertToType(items, cm);
1608
1609         } else if (nn(value)) {
1610            return bs.convertToType(value, cm);
1611         }
1612
1613      } catch (Exception e) {
1614         throw bex(e, cm.inner(), "Error occurred attempting to cast to an object of type ''{0}''", cn(cm));
1615      }
1616
1617      throw bex(cm.inner(), "Cannot convert to class type ''{0}''.  Only beans and maps can be converted using this method.", cn(cm));
1618   }
1619
1620   private PathTraversal getPathTraversal() {
1621      if (pathTraversal == null)
1622         pathTraversal = new PathTraversal(this);
1623      return pathTraversal;
1624   }
1625
1626   /*
1627    * Combines the class specified by a "_type" attribute with the ClassMeta
1628    * passed in through the cast(ClassMeta) method.
1629    * The rule is that child classes supersede parent classes, and c2 supersedes c1
1630    * if one isn't the parent of another.
1631    */
1632   private ClassMeta<?> narrowClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> c1, ClassMeta<?> c2) {
1633      if (c1 == null)
1634         return c2;
1635      ClassMeta<?> c = getNarrowedClassMeta(c1, c2);
1636      if (c1.isMap()) {
1637         ClassMeta<?> k = getNarrowedClassMeta(c1.getKeyType(), c2.getKeyType());
1638         ClassMeta<?> v = getNarrowedClassMeta(c1.getValueType(), c2.getValueType());
1639         return bs().getClassMeta(c.inner(), k, v);
1640      }
1641      if (c1.isCollection()) {
1642         ClassMeta<?> e = getNarrowedClassMeta(c1.getElementType(), c2.getElementType());
1643         return bs().getClassMeta(c.inner(), e);
1644      }
1645      return c;
1646   }
1647}
